---
name: flutter-package-quality
description: Improve Flutter package quality for publishability, CI validation, and release readiness.
---

# Flutter package quality skill

Use this skill when the task involves:

- pubspec metadata hardening
- documentation quality for package consumers
- CI automation for analyzer and tests
- release workflow and publish readiness

Expected outputs:

- validated package metadata
- updated docs and changelog consistency
- reproducible CI steps
- publication checklist status
